prompt: Premium studio product shot of an AITX-branded portable power bank / phone charger, three-quarter hero angle. Slim rectangular power bank with a soft-touch matte black anodized aluminum body, subtly rounded edges and a fine machined chamfer catching a thin highlight. A small orange (#ff4201) AITX open-arms mark is tastefully embossed/printed centered on the front face, plus a tiny row of four white LED charge indicators and a discreet USB-C port on the top edge. Understated, high-end industrial design — think flagship tech accessory. Clean neutral light-gray seamless studio background, soft diffused key light from upper left, gentle soft contact shadow beneath the device, crisp reflections on the matte surface. Color palette strictly AITX: matte black hardware, one orange accent mark, white indicators. Sharp focus, 50mm lens, commercial e-commerce catalog quality, no text or logos other than the AITX mark.
